title: Fix deployment error

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the deployment error that caused the live production deployment of Version 5 to fail. Ensure the backend Motoko code (main.mo and migration.mo) compiles without errors, all frontend TypeScript files compile cleanly, and the full application deploys successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend Motoko actor compiles without errors
The migration module compiles and is compatible with the current actor state
All frontend TypeScript files compile without type errors
The application deploys successfully to production with no deployment errors
All previously implemented features (Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, Field Ops Briefing, Admin Panel with ban/unban system) remain functional after the fix

constraints: Do not remove or break any existing features
Do not change the frontend immutable paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Preserve all existing backend state and data model definitions
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what is needed to fix the deployment error
Redesigning the UI or changing the visual theme
Changing the authentication or admin password system
